description: As a Compliance Manager, create a new Compliance Finding in Eramba to document a gap discovered during the Q1 2025 internal audit against ISO 27001. The finding should be titled 'Missing Cryptographic Key Management Procedure'. The description must explain that the organization lacks a lifecycle management procedure for cryptographic keys, representing a gap against ISO 27001 Annex A control A.10.1.2, which increases the risk of unauthorized access. Set the deadline/expiration to '2025-09-30'.
